title: Trim vehicle components
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Trim vehicle components demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for work

pcs.text: Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Trim materials are selected and inspected for quality1.3 Safety data sheets (SDS) are sourced and interpreted1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Trim tools and equipment and personal protective equipment (PPE) are selected and checked for serviceability1.6 Work is planned to minimise waste and use time efficiently
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Trim materials are selected and inspected for quality1.3 Safety data sheets (SDS) are sourced and interpreted1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Trim tools and equipment and personal protective equipment (PPE) are selected and checked for serviceability1.6 Work is planned to minimise waste and use time efficiently?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Trim materials are selected and inspected for quality1.3 Safety data sheets (SDS) are sourced and interpreted1.4 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed1.5 Trim tools and equipment and personal protective equipment (PPE) are selected and checked for serviceability1.6 Work is planned to minimise waste and use time efficiently.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for work

elements.title: Measure, mark, cut and fabricate trim

pcs.text: Material patterns are developed and prepared for use2.2 Trim materials are measured, marked and cut according to workplace instructions and prepared pattern2.3 Trimming tools and equipment are used according to workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements2.4 Trim is fabricated according to work instructions and job requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Material patterns are developed and prepared for use2.2 Trim materials are measured, marked and cut according to workplace instructions and prepared pattern2.3 Trimming tools and equipment are used according to workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements2.4 Trim is fabricated according to work instructions and job requirements?

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Measure, mark, cut and fabricate trim

elements.title: Attach trim

pcs.text: Trim materials are fitted and checked for alignment, appearance and quality according to job specifications and workplace instructions3.2 Trim materials are attached to vehicle component and checked against specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Trim materials are fitted and checked for alignment, appearance and quality according to job specifications and workplace instructions3.2 Trim materials are attached to vehicle component and checked against specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Trim materials are fitted and checked for alignment, appearance and quality according to job specifications and workplace instructions3.2 Trim materials are attached to vehicle component and checked against specifications.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Attach trim

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Final inspection is made to ensure work meets workplace expectations and component is presented ready for use4.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable materials is collected and stored4.3 Tools and equipment are checked, reported if faulty, and stored according to workplace procedures4.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Final inspection is made to ensure work meets workplace expectations and component is presented ready for use4.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable materials is collected and stored4.3 Tools and equipment are checked, reported if faulty, and stored according to workplace procedures4.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Final inspection is made to ensure work meets workplace expectations and component is presented ready for use4.2 Work area is cleaned, waste and non-recyclable materials are disposed of, and recyclable materials is collected and stored4.3 Tools and equipment are checked, reported if faulty, and stored according to workplace procedures4.4 Workplace documentation is processed according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete work processes
